title: grevillea refracta subsp. glandulifera
intro: Grevillea refracta subsp. glandulifera is a plant species that belongs to the family Proteaceae and is native to Western Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Grevillea refracta subsp. glandulifera include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. It can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which are used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
